en: Click an item to carry it into your next run.
Stash is empty — extract from a run to keep gear.
zh: 仓库空空 —— 撤离才能保住装备。

en: A back-alley ripperdoc. Unlock to augment your attributes with Caps.
zh: 后巷义体医师。解锁后可用瓶盖强化属性。

en: Spend Caps to permanently boost an attribute (max 3 each).
zh: 花费瓶盖永久强化属性（每项最多 3 级）。

en: Stash is empty — extract gear from a run to dismantle or reforge it here.
zh: 仓库空空 —— 撤离带回装备后，方可在此拆解或重铸。

en: Raise this facility's tier to unlock more functions.
zh: 提升该设施等级，解锁更多功能。

en: Salvage and reforge gear at the anvil.
zh: 在铁砧前拆解、重铸装备。

en: Unlock the Forge to dismantle and craft equipment.
zh: 解锁铁匠铺，拆解并打造装备。

en:
• Dismantle gear into scrap
• Craft & reforge equipment
• Higher tiers: reroll affixes, remove curses
zh:
• 拆解装备换取废料
• 打造与重铸装备
• 更高等级：重铸词缀、移除诅咒
义体诊所——永久属性强化。

en: Unlock the Clinic for permanent attribute & max-HP upgrades.
zh: 解锁义体诊所，获得永久属性与生命上限强化。

en:
• Buy attribute perks (STR/CON/INT/LCK/CHA)
• Raise max HP
• Higher tiers: bigger caps
zh:
• 购买属性强化（力/体/智/幸/魅）
• 提升生命上限
• 更高等级：更高强化上限

en: Black market — unlock cards and better stock.
zh: 黑市——解锁卡牌与更优货源。

en: Unlock the Market to unlock cards & improve shops.
zh: 解锁黑市，永久解锁卡牌并改善商店。

en:
• Permanently unlock new cards
• Improve in-run shop stock
• Higher tiers: a card shop
zh:
• 永久解锁新卡牌
• 提升局内商店货源
• 更高等级：卡牌商店

en: Forward outpost — prep gold, discounts, difficulty, deck.
zh: 前哨站——准备资金、折扣、难度与卡组。

en: Unlock the Outpost for run-prep upgrades & difficulty.
zh: 解锁前哨站，获得开局准备强化与难度选择。

en:
• Starting gold, discount, backpack & tool slots
• Reward rerolls & difficulty (Ascension)
• Higher tiers: safe cells, deck editor
zh:
• 起始金币、折扣、背包与工具栏位
• 奖励刷新与难度（飞升）
• 更高等级：安全格、卡组编辑

en: Unlock the Warehouse to stash equipment across runs.
zh: 解锁仓库，跨周目存放装备。

en:
• Store equipment in the stash
• Pull stashed gear into new runs
• Higher tiers: more safe slots
zh:
• 在仓库中存放装备
• 将装备带入新周目
• 更高等级：更多安全栏位
